chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6796 of 2020 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.28985/2020 2. For hearing of main case 07.04.2025 Mr. Jahanzaib Baloch, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ameer Bakhsh Metlo, advocate for respondent Per learned counsel, show cause notice has been impugned herein, however, the same shall be contested before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks that the same be adjudicated vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid no coercive action be taken there against. Learned counsel for respondent articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the petition be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
